message:
fix: make "connection refused" retryable in Dolt retry logic (bd-p3ytz)

When a Dolt server restarts, "connection refused" is transient — the
server will come back within the 30s backoff window. Previously this
was classified as non-retryable, causing a brief server outage to
cascade into permanent failures for all in-flight operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
